code:
import io
import string

fn main() -> Result<Unit, String>
  match io.read_line()
  when None
    Ok(())
  when Some(prefix)
    loop_lines(prefix)
  end
end

fn loop_lines(_ prefix: String) -> Result<Unit, String>
  mut done = false
  while not done
    match io.read_line()
    when None
      done = true
    when Some(line)
      if string.starts_with(line, prefix)
        println("YES")
      else
        println("NO")
      end
    end
  end
  Ok(())
end
